ddls:
CREATE TABLE "solutions" (
  "solve_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each solution */,
  "solve_type" TEXT /* Type of solve performed (e.g., once, iterative) */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used for solving (e.g., auto) */,
  "warm_start" TEXT /* Whether warm start was used */,
  "min_search_proportion" REAL /* Minimum search proportion */,
  "threshold_proportion" REAL /* Threshold proportion for certain conditions */,
  "remove_constraints" INTEGER /* Indicates if constraints were removed */,
  "zero_slack_likelihood" REAL /* Likelihood of zero slack */,
  "n" INTEGER /* Parameter n for the problem */,
  "p" REAL /* Parameter p for the problem */,
  "q" REAL /* Parameter q for the problem */,
  "cut_type" TEXT /* Type of cut used (e.g., fixed) */,
  "cut_value" INTEGER /* Value of the cut */,
  "max_variables" INTEGER /* Maximum number of variables */,
  "max_constraints" INTEGER /* Maximum number of constraints */,
  "total_cpu_time" REAL /* Total CPU time used for the solve */,
  "gurobi_cpu_time" REAL /* CPU time used by Gurobi */,
  "non_gurobi_cpu_time" REAL /* CPU time used by non-Gurobi processes */,
  "objective_value" INTEGER /* Objective value achieved by the solve */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the solution (e.g., completed, in-progress, failed) */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message if the solve failed */,
  "model_file_path" TEXT /* Path to the model file used */,
  "result_file_path" TEXT /* Path to the result file generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("solve_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_solutions_solve_type FOREIGN KEY ("solve_type") REFERENCES solve_types ("solve_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_solutions_warm_start FOREIGN KEY ("warm_start") REFERENCES warm_starts ("warm_start_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_solutions_method FOREIGN KEY ("method") REFERENCES methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_solutions_cut_type FOREIGN KEY ("cut_type") REFERENCES cut_types ("cut_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "solve_types" (
  "solve_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each solve type */,
  "solve_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the solve type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the solve type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the solve type (e.g., exact, heuristic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("solve_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the method */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Specific algorithm used (e.g., simplex, branch-and-bound) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warm_starts" (
  "warm_start_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warm start */,
  "warm_start_name" TEXT /* Name of the warm start */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the warm start */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the warm start (e.g., previous solve, predefined) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warm_start_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cut_types" (
  "cut_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cut type */,
  "cut_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the cut type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cut type */,
  "application" TEXT /* Context where the cut is applied (e.g., preprocessing, iterative) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cut_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "problems" (
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each problem */,
  "problem_name" TEXT /* Name of the problem */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the problem */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the problem (e.g., easy, medium, hard) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry to which the problem belongs (e.g., logistics, finance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("problem_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., R&D, operations) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "problem_solves" (
  "solve_id" INTEGER /* ID of the solution */,
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* ID of the problem solved */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who solved the problem */,
  "solve_date" TEXT /* Date when the problem was solved */,
  "execution_environment" TEXT /* Environment where the solve was executed (e.g., local, cloud) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("solve_id", "problem_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_problem_solves_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "solve_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "solve_id" INTEGER /* ID of the solution */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric (e.g., seconds, milliseconds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_solve_performance_solve_id FOREIGN KEY ("solve_id") REFERENCES solutions ("solve_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "solve_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "solve_id" INTEGER /* ID of the solution */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "parameter_value" REAL /* Value of the parameter */,
  "parameter_type" TEXT /* Type of the parameter (e.g., numerical, categorical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_solve_parameters_solve_id FOREIGN KEY ("solve_id") REFERENCES solutions ("solve_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "solve_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "solve_id" INTEGER /* ID of the solution */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Log message */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date when the log was recorded */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the log (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_solve_logs_solve_id FOREIGN KEY ("solve_id") REFERENCES solutions ("solve_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "solve_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "solve_id" INTEGER /* ID of the solution */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who provided the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was given */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given to the solution (e.g., 1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_solve_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_solve_reviews_solve_id FOREIGN KEY ("solve_id") REFERENCES solutions ("solve_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "solve_shares" (
  "share_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each share */,
  "solve_id" INTEGER /* ID of the solution */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user with whom the solution is shared */,
  "share_date" TEXT /* Date when the solution was shared */,
  "share_permission" TEXT /* Permission level of the share (e.g., read, write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("share_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_solve_shares_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_solve_shares_solve_id FOREIGN KEY ("solve_id") REFERENCES solutions ("solve_id")
)
